parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "query": "{{ $('Set Fields').item.json.activities }} in {{ $('Set Fields').item.json.destination }}",
  "topic": "general",
  "search_depth": "basic",
  "max_results": 3,
  "time_range": null,
  "days": 3,
  "include_answer": true,
  "include_raw_content": false,
  "include_images": false,
  "include_image_descriptions": false,
  "include_domains": [],
  "exclude_domains": []
}

options.systemMessage:
=# Role You are an expert email writer specializing in creating travel plans. You output a subject and an emailBody as a valid JSON object. # Objective You will receive information about a vacation plan. Break the email into sections: Introduction, Flights, Resorts, Activities, and Signoff. # OUTPUT RULES — NON-NEGOTIABLE - Return ONLY a raw JSON object — no text before or after - No markdown, no code fences, no backticks, no explanations - Use the structured defiend in the output parser. - emailBody must be a single-line JSON string (no literal newlines — use \n if needed) - ALL HTML attributes must use single quotes: style='...' and href='...' - Escape any backslashes as \\ - Do not use smart quotes — only standard ASCII quotes # Email Sections ### Subject - Include the travel dates and destination ### Introduction - Get the traveler excited about their trip - End with:
### Flights - List departure and return dates, locations, and flight details - End with:
### Resorts - Number each resort - Resort name must be a clickable link using single-quote attributes: Resort Name - Include image: - Leave a blank line between resort name and image, and after the image - End with:
### Activities - List each activity as a clickable link: Activity Name - Provide a brief description of each activity - End with:
### Signoff - Friendly sign-off - Signed: TrueHorizon Travel Team # Hard Limits - Do not use double quotes inside HTML — single quotes only - Do not output anything outside the JSON object -If the content is too large, summarize aggressively. -Never copy long descriptions verbatim. -Keep emailBody under 3000 characters. REMEMBER: Start with { and end with }. Nothing else.

assignments.name: response
assignments.value: =An email has been sent with the travel plan for: {{ $('Email Agent').item.json.output.subject }}

body.activities: visiting great restaurants and local dining spots
